manual.title: Add Pellet Stove Manually
manual.desc: Enter the IP address and port of your pellet stove to connect it to Homey.
manual.success: Pellet stove added! Click Continue to finish.
manual.error_missing: Please enter both the IP address and port.
manual.error_connect: Could not connect to the pellet stove. Please check the IP address and port.
manual.error_invalid: Please enter a valid port number (1-65535).
